description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- config: enforce lf line endings by @zevnda in #1910
- fix(games-list): hide recently played sort for cli accounts without a… by @zevnda in #1911
- refactor(achievement-unlocker): use circular progress indicator for i… by @zevnda in #1912
- feat(achievement-unlocker): support two decimal precision for unlock … by @zevnda in #1913
- fix(ui): visible scrollbar during sidebar uncollapse by @zevnda in #1914
- build(deps): bump fumadocs-mdx from 15.0.11 to 15.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in #1822
- build(deps-dev): bump postcss from 8.5.11 to 8.5.19 by @dependabot[bot] in #1818
- build(deps): bump serde_with from 3.20.0 to 3.21.0 in /src-tauri by @dependabot[bot] in #1867
- chore(dev): auto-rebuild libs when stale by @zevnda in #1915
- fix(inventory-manager): respect custom price when selling all/dupes by @zevnda in #1916
